Modify the function to handle mixed-type arrays correctly. This can be done by adding a check for non-string elements in the array and if found, handle them accordingly. For example, if a non-string element is found, it can be converted to a string and then handled as a string element.

Use a more robust string handling approach to handle the string elements in the array.
